subcodes.first_line: O thou enraptured wanderer in the wilderness of God's love! Blessed art thou, for thy horizon hath been illumined with the resplendent dawn, and thy morn hath breathed forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المستهام فی بیداء محبه الله طوبی لک لاح افقک بالفجر الساطع و تنفس صبحک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for teaching
